new_claims.claim_text: China preparing to deliver MANPADs to Iran, potentially routed through third countries.
new_claims.notes: US intelligence indicates this. China denies. Potential obfuscation of origin raises questions about truth and evidence in public discourse.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump threatens to cut off all trade with Spain for refusing to participate in Israel's 'terrorist (and pointless) war of aggression.'
new_claims.notes: Highly rhetorical language used. Political threat with potential economic consequences.

new_claims.claim_text: UK is preparing a nationwide wartime readiness plan.
new_claims.notes: According to the head of its armed forces. Aims to shift the country onto a war footing.

new_claims.claim_text: Germany is debating fitting its next-generation F127 air-defense frigates with US-made AEGIS combat system and SPY-6 radar.
new_claims.notes: Amid rising concerns over Europe’s growing dependence on American defense technology.
